CustomField.formula: IF( Sales_Order__c != '', HYPERLINK("/" & Sales_Order__r.Id, Sales_Order__r.Name), if( Order_S__c != '', HYPERLINK("/" & Order_S__r.Id, Order_S__r.Name),if( Work_Order__c != '', HYPERLINK("/" & Work_Order__r.Id, Work_Order__r.Name), IF(Manufacturing_Order__c != '', HYPERLINK("/" & Manufacturing_Order__r.Id, Manufacturing_Order__r.Name), HYPERLINK("/" & Id, Name) ))))
CustomField.label: Order
